name: Homarr
compose:
name: slashnode-homarr
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/homarr-labs/homarr:v1.67.0
    container_name: homarr
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      SECRET_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - web_data:/appdata
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:7575:7575
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-homarr_web_data
